chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.746 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 21.05.2025 Ms. Rukhsana Abdullah, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Ms. Sidra Zaib, advocate for complainant IO/PI Irshad Ahmed Leghari of PS Docks ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Zulqarnain Khan son of Fareeduddin Khan seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.21/2025 for offence under section 489-F, PPC, after rejection of his bail plea by learned Additional Sessions Judge-XII, Karachi West vide order dated 18.03.2025. At the very outset, learned counsel for applicant submits that the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and alleged offence is compoundable. She prayed that interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant may be confirmed. Learned counsel for complainant admits the position that the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and she recorded her no objection for confirmation of bail. Learned A.P.G. has also recorded her no objection. Since the alleged offence is compoundable and the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court, therefore, interim pre-arrest bail granted applicant above named by this Court vide order dated 21.03.2025 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Instant criminal bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
